root_text.an4.91:2.1: Kathañca, bhikkhave, puggalo asuro hoti asuraparivāro?
root_text.an4.91:2.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco puggalo dussīlo hoti pāpadhammo, parisāpissa hoti dussīlā pāpadhammā.
root_text.an4.91:2.3: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, puggalo asuro hoti asuraparivāro.
root_text.an4.91:3.1: Kathañca, bhikkhave, puggalo asuro hoti devaparivāro?
root_text.an4.91:3.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco puggalo dussīlo hoti pāpadhammo, parisā ca khvassa hoti sīlavatī kalyāṇadhammā.
root_text.an4.91:3.3: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, puggalo asuro hoti devaparivāro.
root_text.an4.91:4.1: Kathañca, bhikkhave, puggalo devo hoti asuraparivāro?
root_text.an4.91:4.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco puggalo sīlavā hoti kalyāṇadhammo, parisā ca khvassa hoti dussīlā pāpadhammā.
root_text.an4.91:4.3: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, puggalo devo hoti asuraparivāro.
root_text.an4.91:5.1: Kathañca, bhikkhave, puggalo devo hoti devaparivāro?
root_text.an4.91:5.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco puggalo sīlavā hoti kalyāṇadhammo, parisāpissa hoti sīlavatī kalyāṇadhammā.
root_text.an4.91:5.3: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, puggalo devo hoti, devaparivāro.
root_text.an4.91:5.4: Ime kho, bhikkhave, cattāro puggalā santo saṁvijjamānā lokasmin”ti.

translation_text.an4.91:1.1: “Mendicants, these four individuals are found in the world.
translation_text.an4.91:1.5: a god surrounded by titans, and
translation_text.an4.91:2.1: And how is an individual a titan surrounded by titans?
translation_text.an4.91:2.2: It’s when an individual is unethical, of bad character, and their followers are the same.
translation_text.an4.91:2.3: That’s how an individual is a titan surrounded by titans.
translation_text.an4.91:3.1: And how is an individual a titan surrounded by gods?
translation_text.an4.91:3.2: It’s when an individual is unethical, of bad character, but their followers are ethical, of good character.
translation_text.an4.91:3.3: That’s how an individual is a titan surrounded by gods.
translation_text.an4.91:4.1: And how is an individual a god surrounded by titans?
translation_text.an4.91:4.2: It’s when an individual is ethical, of good character, but their followers are unethical, of bad character.
translation_text.an4.91:4.3: That’s how an individual is a god surrounded by titans.
translation_text.an4.91:5.1: And how is an individual a god surrounded by gods?
translation_text.an4.91:5.2: It’s when an individual is ethical, of good character, and their followers are the same.
translation_text.an4.91:5.3: That’s how an individual is a god surrounded by gods.
translation_text.an4.91:5.4: These are the four individuals found in the world.”
